name: The New India Assurance Company Limited
summary: The New India Assurance Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a general insurance company in India and internationally. The company provides marine cargo and hull, motor, health, travel, home and contents, customized business and SME products, other personal, industrial, rural, machinery, aviation, liability, fire and burglary, crop, personal accident, and property insurance products. It also offers reinsurance products. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
